markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Re-intake to align on Vizcom's brand, audience, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Core Value:** Vizcom helps industrial designers build confidence by quickly visualizing ideas, making the physical product the new signal of quality against a backdrop of AI-generated "slop."](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Audience Focus:** The primary revenue drivers are Automotive (45%) and Footwear/Apparel (35%), with the latter showing faster growth.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Shift from social-only brand-building to a dual strategy that captures high-intent users in AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity) during their evaluation and comparison phases.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [**Action Plan:** GrowthX Labs will develop a new content strategy focused on expert curation and "accelerating time to inspiration," mirroring Vizcom's product value.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)

## Topics

### Vizcom's Brand & Value Proposition

  - [**Mission:** Bridge the gap from physical to digital for industrial designers.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Core Value:** Build confidence faster by visualizing ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [**Brand Positioning:** A premium software tool (like Figma, Linear) for designers with clarity, not a generic AI image generator.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**Market Context:** AI-generated "slop" devalues digital renders. The physical product is now the new signal of effort and quality.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Audience & Growth Drivers

  - [**Primary Users:** Industrial designers, product designers, and automotive designers.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Revenue Mix:**](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [Automotive: 45%](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [Footwear & Apparel: 35% (fastest-growing segment)](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [**Current Strategy:** Social media (e.g., Instagram) for brand-building via thought-provoking concepts, with Vizcom as a secondary mention.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

### Proposed Content Strategy Pivot

  - [**Problem:** A social-only strategy misses high-intent users in the purchase funnel.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [**Solution:** A dual strategy combining social brand-building with a compounding content asset on the website.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=2616.0)
  - [**New Focus:** Capture users in AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity) during their evaluation, comparison, and research phases.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=2225.0)
  - [**Content Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
      - [**Expert Curation:** Profiles of famous designers, trend analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=2462.0)
      - [**"First Principles" Learning:** Foundational guides for new designers.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
      - [**Inspiration Galleries:** Curated visual content.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=2733.0)
      - [**Product Guides:** "How to do X in Vizcom" content.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=2408.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jordan:** Share internal documents (e.g., slide decks) to inform the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
  - [**GrowthX Labs:**](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
      - [Develop a new content strategy proposal focused on expert curation and "accelerating time to inspiration."](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
      - [Involve Ren (ex-Lyft design head, A16Z advisor) in the process.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
      - [Present the visual proposal to Jordan by mid-next week.](https://fathom.video/share/9WztkJsS2ax-VTCc8rQTNWwEpArhc91x?tab=summary&timestamp=2586.0)
